name: diff_tool
description: Compare two strings or files and produce unified diffs or structured side-by-side comparisons. Use to review code changes, verify rewrites preserved intended behavior, audit file modifications, or apply patches. Returns line-by-line statistics (added, removed, changed blocks) in addition to the diff content.

action.description: Operation to perform. diff_strings: compare two string values. diff_files: compare two files. patch_apply: apply a unified diff patch to a string.

a.description: First string to compare (diff_strings), or source text to patch (patch_apply).

b.description: Second string to compare (diff_strings), or the unified diff patch content (patch_apply).

file_a.description: Path to the first file (diff_files action).

file_b.description: Path to the second file (diff_files action).

context.description: Number of unchanged lines to show around each change in the diff. Defaults to 3.

output_format.description: Output format: 'unified' returns a standard unified diff string; 'side_by_side' returns a structured list of change blocks.

encoding.description: File encoding for diff_files. Defaults to utf-8.
